# HR Payroll React Project

- This workspace is a React + TypeScript app created with Vite.
- `src/App.tsx` is the app entry and currently contains the HR payroll UI shell.
- Use `npm install`, `npm run dev`, and `npm run build` to run and verify the app.
- Add mock HTML conversion components under `src/components` as you translate the design.
- Keep README and project metadata aligned with the HR payroll UI purpose.
